findings.description: append_fix_waves swallows JSON parse errors from findings.json instead of returning a structured error. A malformed findings file should fail loudly so the orchestrator can surface it; silently continuing would leave the manifest unchanged with no signal.
findings.suggested_fix: Return Err(CompileError::FindingsParse(io_err)) and propagate. Add a unit test that feeds in invalid JSON and asserts the error variant.

findings.description: The Finding struct field `id` shadows the Rust prelude's notion of identity. Rename to `finding_id` for clarity at call sites.

compile-plan SKILL.md APPEND-mode section does not state what happens when findings.json contains zero findings. Document explicitly that an empty findings array is valid and produces no new fix-wave.
